message:
ui(home): tweet wall masonry + bigger author artifact

Homepage

- Increase the "From the Author" artifact avatar from 64px to 96px (md: 112px) and update next/image sizes for correct responsive loading.

Tweet wall layout

- Replace the equal-height grid (auto-rows-fr + h-full) with a Pinterest-style masonry using CSS columns (1 col -> 2 cols on md+).

- Add break-inside-avoid and remove h-full so cards size to their content (no more tall/skinny cards with dead padding).

Tweet typography

- Tighten fallback card padding and improve body typography (more readable size/leading; remove forced bottom link push).

react-tweet overrides

- Override theme vars to use Inter, reduce tweet body font sizing/leading, and allow embeds to fill our card width (remove the default 550px cap).

Beads

- Close bd-2zz.

Validation

- bun tsc --noEmit

- bun lint (2 existing warnings)

- bun run build

files.patch:
@@ -378,12 +378,12 @@ export default function HomePage() { {/* Tweet wall */}
